rulings.Case Title: PHYLLIS SPARKS-MAGDALUYO VS. NEW PENN FINANCIAL, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-19-664101 WITH CASE CGC-18-568443
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 10, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF PHYLLIS SPARKS-MAGDALUYO MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-19-664101 WITH CASE CGC-18-568443 OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 1005 and CRC 3.1300(c). Moving papers must be filed and served at least 16 court days before the hearing. This motion was filed on March 28, 2019, i.e. 8 court days before the hearing. Proof of service must be filed as least 5 court days before the hearing. There is no valid proof of service on file. Proof of service filed on March 28, 2019 indicates that the moving papers were provided to a messenger service. No proof of service by the messenger. The Court notes that this is the second time this motion is being taken off calendar for failure to comply with CCP 1005 and CRC 3.1300. Additionally no courtesy copies of the moving papers have been provided. Counsel for Plaintiff is ordered to review procedural requirements of CCP, CRC, and SFLR and comply with all of them in future. = (501/CFH)
